title: koeleria splendens
intro: Koeleria splendens, also known as June grass or prairie June grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and saponins, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Koeleria splendens can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
